base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pipe_vertical_green — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Pipe cap + body tiles — cap is 32×16 (2 8×16 tiles wide × 16 tall), body can repeat vertically. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pipe cap + body tiles — cap is 32×16 (2 8×16 tiles wide × 16 tall), body can repeat vertically; static, no animation. Pipe tiles act as solid platforms and transition points (warp when Mario enters from top + holds down)
